body:
Thank you for referring this patient who I saw in clinic today.

On examination her visual acuity was 6/9 in the right eye and 6/6 in the left eye. Intraocular pressures were 14mmHg bilaterally. Anterior segments were quiet. Fundoscopy revealed a small epiretinal membrane over the right macula with mild surface wrinkling but no significant traction.

I have reassured Mrs Smith that this does not require intervention at present. I would be grateful if you could refer her back should she notice any deterioration in vision.

I will review her in six months.
